title: Codex Pinning Cooperative
tagline: A community-run pinning service for Codex storage.
summary: A cooperative that lets contributors pool storage commitments and serve Codex pins for public-good content under a shared SLA.
description: Pinning services are the centralisation seam in every IPFS-style storage stack. A Codex pinning cooperative would let independent operators stake spare disk and bandwidth, agree on a baseline SLA, and split fee revenue, with the membership and accounting transparent on-chain. Reference precedents: Filebase but co-operatively owned; community archives like Distributed Press treated as a first-class user.
